prompt: Run the e2e judge against the deployed EAGLE app. Just do login, home, and chat journeys. I've set EAGLE_TEST_EMAIL and EAGLE_TEST_PASSWORD in my env already.
assertions: Uses the e2e_judge_orchestrator.py as the entry point
Uses the correct internal ALB URL (internal-eaglec-front-teerfwosqs71)
Does NOT hardcode credentials — uses env vars or omits auth flags since user said they're set
Mentions pre-send screenshots (captured before each user message is sent)
Mentions 30-second interval screenshots during streaming waits
Mentions expected output: results JSON, markdown report, and screenshots directory
